title: Rockpool hunting before lunch
summary: A simple morning adventure: check the tide, explore rockpools, then grab a treat nearby.
steps: Check low tide|Pack reef shoes|Explore gently|Finish with a bakery stop
best_for: Curious kids and families wanting a quick nature outing
parent_tip: Go early before it gets hot.

title: Library and hot chocolate rainy day
summary: A gentle rainy-day outing built around storytime, browsing books and a small cafe treat.
steps: Check storytime schedule|Visit the library|Choose books|Finish with hot chocolate
parent_tip: Make it feel like a tiny tradition.
